slice: Packet #7 — external/off-LAN gateway-path vantage (SCOPING slice, not implementation)
lane: operator-directed (ChatGPT-scoped as positioning slice, not probe-expansion)
doctrine: External vantage is not higher authority. It is position diversity: a different place from which the same path claim can be witnessed or refused.
vantage_selected: public NQ VM (labelwatch / Linode), declared SHARED SUBSTRATE (v0). Rejected: Mac mini (on-LAN, control not external witness). Deferred upgrade: dedicated clean Linode (YAGNI for a scoping slice).
decisive_finding: Home WAN is behind CGNAT -> NO inbound reachability -> an external vantage CANNOT directly probe the home WAN gateway. Direct VM->home-WAN witnessing is structurally impossible. Viable channel is egress-liveness: home beacons OUT to the VM, VM witnesses arrival/absence. This reshapes #7b before any build.

declarations.witness_position: Linode, public internet outside home NAT/CGNAT; addrs 192.46.223.21 / 2600:3c04::f03c:93ff:fec9:780a (already public via DNS); trust limit = shared root-run substrate, a position not an authority.
declarations.perturbation_budget: receive-only on VM; low-rate egress beacon from a LAN host; short timeout; back off on failure; stop on shared-VM load / secret pressure / ambiguity.
declarations.custody_boundary: VM may hold its own receive-side beacon arrival/absence timestamps (benign). MUST stay LAN-local: pfSense probe key ~/.ssh/nq_pfsense_probe, dpinger reads, runs/ data, home WAN addr, LAN MACs/hostnames.

smoke_test: read-only, done: VM external vantage live (control 1.1.1.1 reachable), egress channel works (sushi-k -> nq.neutral.zone 200). No probing of home from outside. No LAN data left the LAN.
scope_guard: Did NOT deploy a long-running agent, build a probe, alter gateway-path verdict semantics, probe LAN-only targets from public hosts, copy LAN secrets to the VM, or start #8/#9/#10. Scoping only.
handoff_7b: Implement external gateway-path witness as egress-liveness (LAN beacon -> VM witnesses arrival/absence) using declared vantage+budget+custody. Verdict semantics unchanged (corroborates/refuses same WAN-path-alive claim, not a new authority).
acceptance: One vantage selected (public VM, shared-substrate) + one explicitly rejected (Mac mini); witness-position declaration, perturbation budget, custody boundary all exist; smoke test read-only + documented; no LAN secrets left LAN. Packet #7 scoping DONE. Loop returns to AUDIT/idle. #7b (implementation) gated on operator direction.
